have h₁ : IntervalIntegrable f μ a b := by
      -- Use the fact that the integral of the scalar multiple is the scalar multiple of the integral
      have h₂ : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) μ a b := by
        -- Use the boundedness of the scalar multiplication to show integrability
        have h₃ : IsBoundedSMul R E := inferInstance
        have h₄ : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => r • f x) μ a b := h
        -- Use the property of interval integrability under scalar multiplication
        have h₅ : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) μ a b := by
          -- Apply the scalar multiplication property of integrals
          by_cases h₆ : r = 0
          · -- If r = 0, then r • f = 0, which is trivially integrable
            have h₇ : (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) = (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) := rfl
            simp_all [h₆]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆])
          · -- If r ≠ 0, use the boundedness of the scalar multiplication
            have h₇ : (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) = (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) := rfl
            simp_all [h₆]
            <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆]) <;>
            (try simp_all [h₆])
            <;>
            (try
              {
                -- Use the boundedness of the scalar multiplication to show integrability
                have h₈ : IsBoundedSMul R E := inferInstance
                have h₉ : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => r • f x) μ a b := h
                have h₁₀ : IntervalIntegrable (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) μ a b := by
                  -- Apply the scalar multiplication property of integrals
                  refine' (isBoundedSMul.bounded h₈).intervalIntegrable_of_intervalIntegrable _
                  simpa [SMul.smul] using h₉
                exact h₁₀
              })
        exact h₅
      -- Simplify the expression to get the original function
      have h₃ : (fun x => (1 : R) • f x) = f := by
        funext x
        simp [one_smul]
      rw [h₃] at h₂
      exact h₂
    exact h₁
